title_zh: 南方科技大学地球物理学博士
school_en: Southern University of Science and Technology
edu_intro_zh: 从高中到博士阶段的完整学术路径。
edu_intro_en: A complete academic path from high school to doctoral studies.
edu1_en: High School Affiliated to Guangxi University
edu3_zh: 南方科技大学（硕士、博士）
res1_zh: 基于高密度电法的人体含水量分析
res1_en: Human body water content analysis based on high-density electrical resistivity tomography
res1_desc_zh: 通过在皮肤上部署高密度电极阵列，并采用偶极-偶极激励的有限差分正向建模，该方法利用组织间固有的生物电阻抗差异，实现高分辨率区分，并通过时空电阻率变化准确量化区域和全身含水量。
res1_desc_en: By deploying a high-density electrode array on the skin and employing finite-difference forward modeling with dipole-dipole excitation, this method leverages the inherent bioelectrical impedance differences between tissues to achieve high-resolution differentiation and accurately quantifies regional and systemic water content through spatiotemporal resistivity changes.
res2_desc_zh:
将细石英砂在高压下压实，模拟海底沉积物，孔隙中充满天然气；利用天然气和盐水饱和砂之间的电阻率差异，反演得到高分辨率
的海底天然气分布图。
res2_desc_en: Fine quartz sand was compacted under high pressure to simulate seabed sediments, with the pores filled with natural gas. High-resolution seabed natural gas distribution maps were obtained by utilizing the resistivity difference between natural gas and brine-saturated sand.
res3_zh: 基于集群机的MT实时动态监测系统建设与软件开发
res3_en: Construction and Software Development of a Real-time Dynamic Monitoring System for MT Based on Cluster Machines
res3_desc_zh:
建立了实时现场大地电磁监测平台，数据通过 4G 网络即时传输到 Linux 集群进行存储和实时处理；基于 PyQt 的交互式界面和
Python 软件实现了对实时大地电磁数据的远程可视化和即时分析。
res3_desc_en: A real-time on-site magnetotelluric monitoring platform was established, with data transmitted instantly via a 4G network to a Linux cluster for storage and real-time processing. Remote visualization and real-time analysis of the real-time magnetotelluric data were achieved using an interactive PyQt interface and Python software.
res4_zh: 基于井震资料地电模型建模与软件实现
res4_en: Geoelectric Modeling from Seismic and Well-Logging Data
res4_desc_zh: 读取并转换地震与测井数据为地形结构，在COMSOL中构建分层模型并分配电阻率后完成有限元正演建模；开发基于PyQt的界面用于高效数据处理与可视化。
res4_desc_en: Converted seismic and logging data into terrain structures, built layered COMSOL models with resistivity assignments for FEM forward modeling, and developed a PyQt UI for efficient processing and visualization.

skills.desc_zh: 熟练掌握数据处理，能够独立完成项目代码编写。
skills.desc_en: Proficient in data processing and able to independently deliver project code.

skills.title_zh: 地球物理数据处理与建模
skills.desc_zh: 具备有限差分与有限元建模经验，熟悉 COMSOL、PyQt 及实时监测系统流程。
skills.desc_en: Hands-on experience with FDM/FEM modeling, COMSOL, PyQt, and real-time monitoring pipelines.

skills.desc_zh: 作为学校主力球员，获得多项省级奖项。
skills.desc_en: Core team player with multiple provincial-level awards.
